testcase.name: test_data_manager_basic_health_and_config_validation
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:459 统一基础设施集成层不可用，使用标准logging WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:495 使用降级基础设施服务 WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:516 降级缓存初始化失败: No module named 'src.data.core.cache' INFO data_registry:registry.py:36 DataRegistry initialized INFO disk_cache:disk_cache.py:76 DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: cache INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:245 使用降级缓存管理器 WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:847 StockDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:853 IndexDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:860 NewsDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:867 FinancialDataLoader not available INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:578 核心服务注册完成 INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:269 DataManager initialized successfully INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:1258 DataManager shutdown completed --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_data_manager_store_and_metadata_cycle
